name: Thomas Bell
background: Thomas A. Bell has served as our Chief Executive Officer since May 2023. Prior to joining Leidos, Mr. Bell was President of Defense at Rolls-Royce and Chairman and CEO of Rolls-Royce North America. He also previously served as Senior Vice President of Global Strategy and Business Development at Boeing Defense, Space & Security.

company_affiliations.name: Rolls-Royce Holdings plc
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President and CEO, Rolls-Royce North America; President, Global Defense
